name: agent-skills
description: Agent skills for research, industrial R&D, paper writing, PhD applications, language learning, presentation and slides, and coding support.

skills.name: code-simplify
skills.description: Simplify over-engineered research and implementation code.

skills.name: context7-mcp
skills.description: Use Context7 for library, framework, and API reference support.

skills.name: debugging-strategies
skills.description: Apply systematic debugging, profiling, and root cause analysis.

skills.name: python-code-style
skills.description: Guide Python style, linting, naming, and documentation conventions.

skills.name: python-design-patterns
skills.description: Guide Python design patterns, refactoring, and architecture decisions.

skills.name: python-performance-optimization
skills.description: Profile and optimize Python performance bottlenecks.

skills.name: python-testing-patterns
skills.description: Design and implement Python tests with pytest and fixtures.

skills.name: industry-problem-framing
skills.description: Convert vague industry problems into researchable, pilotable R&D problem statements.

skills.name: publication-grounded-solution-design
skills.description: Design industry solution directions grounded in prior successful cases, publications, and transfer assumptions.

skills.name: pilot-and-evaluation-design
skills.description: Design practical pilots, baselines, metrics, guardrails, and go/no-go criteria.

skills.name: banking-ai-literature-mapper
skills.description: Map banking AI publications, cases, benchmarks, methods, and evaluation patterns.

skills.name: banking-use-case-discovery
skills.description: Discover and prioritize banking and fintech AI/R&D use cases.

skills.name: research-codebase
skills.description: Structure and maintain a research codebase for fast hypothesis testing.

skills.name: research-codebase-readme-writer
skills.description: Write or audit a README for a research repository.

skills.name: ielts-learning-planner
skills.description: Build a personalised IELTS study plan with weekly schedules, drills, and progress milestones.

skills.name: ielts-reading-strategies
skills.description: Teach, practise, and give feedback on IELTS Academic or General Training Reading strategies.

skills.name: ielts-speaking-coach
skills.description: Simulate, score, and give feedback on IELTS Speaking tests across Parts 1, 2, and 3.

skills.name: ielts-vocabulary-builder
skills.description: Build, drill, and apply IELTS-relevant vocabulary for Writing, Speaking, and Reading.

skills.name: ielts-writing-task1
skills.description: Draft, analyse, score, and improve IELTS Academic Writing Task 1 responses.

skills.name: ielts-writing-task2
skills.description: Draft, analyse, score, and improve IELTS Academic or General Training Writing Task 2 essays.

skills.name: applicant-profile-reader
skills.description: Read academic-career applicant profile files and extract reusable evidence for SOPs, CVs, fit mapping, emails, and application audits.

skills.name: academic-cv-builder
skills.description: Build and audit academic CVs for PhD, research, fellowship, internship, and RA applications.

skills.name: phd-application-package-auditor
skills.description: Audit a full PhD application package for coherence, missing evidence, risks, and priorities.

skills.name: phd-program-fit-mapper
skills.description: Map applicant interests to PhD programs, faculty, labs, and school-specific fit evidence.

skills.name: professor-research-direction-mapper
skills.description: Define a professor's recent and trending research direction for fit notes, SOPs, and outreach.

skills.name: professor-cold-email-drafter
skills.description: Draft, critique, and revise concise cold emails to professors and PIs.

skills.name: recommendation-letter-strategist
skills.description: Choose recommenders, plan letter strategy, draft requests, and prepare recommender packets.

skills.name: sop-writer
skills.description: Write, review, score, and iterate Statements of Purpose and PhD application essays.

skills.name: artifact-release-packager
skills.description: Plan and audit research artifact releases for papers.

skills.name: phd-motivation-keeper
skills.description: Help PhD applicants or students recover motivation and rebuild momentum after setbacks.

skills.name: reproducibility-audit
skills.description: Audit whether research results can be reproduced from available code, data, configs, and documentation.

skills.name: data-pipeline-auditor
skills.description: Audit preprocessing, splits, leakage, augmentation, labels, and distribution mismatch.

skills.name: experiment-trace-summarizer
skills.description: Turn messy logs, notebooks, and run metadata into clear research updates and next actions.

skills.name: hyperparameter-triage
skills.description: Prioritize hyperparameters that matter for the current failure mode or objective.

skills.name: representation-probe-designer
skills.description: Design probes and diagnostics for learned model representations.

skills.name: scaling-law-tracker
skills.description: Track performance changes with data, model size, batch size, or compute.

skills.name: training-run-forensics
skills.description: Diagnose unstable, divergent, plateaued, or underperforming training runs.

skills.name: experiment-design
skills.description: Design minimal decision-relevant experiments with fair baselines and measurable success criteria.

skills.name: benchmark-and-baseline-selector
skills.description: Select the minimal and suggested baselines and benchmarks needed to support a research claim.

skills.name: statistical-testing-guide
skills.description: Choose statistical tests, compute effect sizes, plan power, and report statistics correctly.

skills.name: hypothesis-and-ablation-planner
skills.description: Design ablations that isolate causal mechanisms and alternative explanations.

skills.name: eval-suite-designer
skills.description: Design task-specific evaluation suites with clear failure modes, metrics, and decision criteria.

skills.name: failure-taxonomist
skills.description: Cluster model failures into actionable categories.

skills.name: judge-reliability-checker
skills.description: Audit LLM-as-judge setups for bias, prompt sensitivity, variance, and disagreement with human criteria.

skills.name: latency-quality-tradeoff-optimizer
skills.description: Compare model, decoding, caching, and routing choices against quality, latency, and cost.

skills.name: prompt-policy-ablator
skills.description: Design controlled comparisons for prompts, routing, tools, and system policies.

skills.name: rag-diagnostics-analyst
skills.description: Diagnose retrieval, context selection, grounding, and generation failures in RAG systems.

skills.name: model-eval-error-analysis
skills.description: Evaluate models rigorously and inspect where they fail.

skills.name: research-idea-stress-test
skills.description: Stress-test a research idea before major investment.

skills.name: paper-idea-and-scope-brainstormer
skills.description: Brainstorm a research idea and scope what a new paper should cover, upstream of stress-testing and argument planning.

skills.name: pytorch-training-recipe
skills.description: Produce an implementable PyTorch or Lightning training recipe.

skills.name: jax-training-recipe
skills.description: Produce an implementable JAX, Flax, and Optax training recipe.

skills.name: related-work-writer
skills.description: Write or revise a Related Work section from a source-grounded literature map.

skills.name: citation-auditor
skills.description: Audit citations for existence, attribution, and claim-to-source accuracy.

skills.name: literature-triangulation
skills.description: Build a source-grounded map of a research topic by comparing papers, benchmarks, code, and disagreements.

skills.name: abstract-and-intro-writer
skills.description: Draft or revise the abstract and introduction of a research paper.

skills.name: method-section-writer
skills.description: Draft or revise the method section of a research paper with consistent notation and motivation.

skills.name: discussion-report-synthesizer
skills.description: Synthesize fragmented academic conversations into cohesive, structured markdown reports.

skills.name: figure-table-planner
skills.description: Plan and audit figures, tables, captions, and visual evidence for a research paper.

skills.name: paper-argument-planner
skills.description: Plan the argument of a research paper from ideas, drafts, results, or notes.

skills.name: results-writeup
skills.description: Turn verified research findings into calibrated scientific writing.

skills.name: research-talk-planner
skills.description: Plan and structure a research talk from a paper, results, or research agenda.

skills.name: reviewer-response-strategist
skills.description: Plan rebuttals, reviewer responses, and revision strategies.

skills.name: submission-readiness-audit
skills.description: Audit a paper, appendix, or submission package before deadline.

skills.name: venue-targeting
skills.description: Select and prioritize publication venues and plan resubmission strategy after rejection.

skills.name: professor-mentor-technical-teaching
skills.description: Explain advanced technical topics with professor-style intuition, rigor, implementation grounding, and critical judgment.

skills.name: gap-finder
skills.description: Surface publishable theoretical gaps in research papers, including hidden assumptions, loose bounds, missing guarantees, and uncovered settings.

skills.name: theorem-and-claim-audit
skills.description: Pressure-test mathematical arguments and ML paper claims.

skills.name: assumption-extractor
skills.description: Extract explicit and hidden assumptions from proofs, models, and empirical arguments.

skills.name: counterexample-hunter
skills.description: Search for edge cases and constructions that break claims or weaken theorems.

skills.name: derivation-auditor
skills.description: Check algebra, calculus, probability, linear algebra, and asymptotic derivation steps.

skills.name: formalism-translator
skills.description: Translate ideas across optimization, probability, information theory, dynamical systems, graph theory, and statistics.

skills.name: paper-to-theorem-distiller
skills.description: Distill dense theory papers into definitions, claims, proof strategy, and reusable techniques.

skills.name: proof-sketcher
skills.description: Convert informal mathematical ideas into theorem, lemma, or proof scaffolds.

skills.name: theory-to-toy-cases
skills.description: Turn abstract math or ML ideas into minimal examples, counterexamples, sanity checks, and simulations.

skills.name: slide-design-principles
skills.description: Shared slide-spec schema and design rules for clear, focused, well-structured decks.

skills.name: beamer-academic-deck
skills.description: Build compile-ready LaTeX Beamer decks for academic talks, seminars, conferences, defenses, and lectures.

skills.name: beamer-proposal-report-deck
skills.description: Build compile-ready LaTeX Beamer decks for research proposals, progress reports, milestone reviews, and final reports.

skills.name: business-report-deck
skills.description: Build PowerPoint or Canva business report decks for executives, managers, clients, pilots, and stakeholder updates.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Create, improve, and evaluate agent skills.
